description:
• 3-in-1 Functionality :This Mandoline Food Slicer offers 3-in-1 functionality, combining a slicer, chopper, and cutter in one compact kitchen tool.

• Adjustable Settings :With adjustable settings, this food slicer allows you to customize the size of your cuts, making it perfect for preparing any type of dish.

• Eco-Friendly Material :Made from eco-friendly plastic, this food slicer is safe for use in food preparation and contributes to environmental sustainability.

• Fast Meal Prep :This food slicer streamlines your cooking process, allowing you to prepare meals faster and more efficiently.

• Versatile Use :Ideal for slicing vegetables, fruits, and other food items, this tool is a versatile addition to any kitchen.

• Compact Design :Its compact design makes it easy to store in any kitchen cabinet or drawer, saving space while still providing essential functionality.

Features:

【Safe Mandoline Food Slicer】: Our multifunctional slicer prioritizes user safety with a concealed blade, ensuring precise and secure slicing of a variety of foods like fruits, vegetables, and cheeses. Enjoy efficient slicing without compromising safety.

【Adjustable Vegetable Chopper】: Equipped with interchangeable blades and a versatile cutting platform offering sizes from 2mm to 7mm, this vegetable slicer grater also functions as a convenient vegetable chopper. Effortlessly chop, slice, julienne, and dice a wide range of vegetables, simplifying your meal preparation.

【French Fry Cutter】: Turn potatoes into perfect French fry shapes effortlessly. Our slicer includes a dedicated French fry blade, allowing you to quickly and uniformly cut potatoes, resulting in golden and crispy homemade fries that will delight your family and friends.

【Easy to Clean and Store】: Our user-friendly design extends to cleaning and storage. The slicer disassembles effortlessly, facilitating thorough cleaning after use. Its compact design ensures convenient storage, making it an ideal addition to any kitchen.

【Enhanced Durability】: Crafted from high-quality materials, this slicer is built to withstand regular kitchen use. Its durable construction guarantees long-lasting performance, providing you with a reliable kitchen tool that will stand the test of time.

Specification:

Product Name

Multifunctional Vegetable Cutter

Product Material

ABS + 304 stainless steel

blade

2&4mm+3.5mm+7mm

Package includes：

Multifunctional Vegetable Cutter * 1

blade *3

Transparent box * 1

Noted/Tips:

1.Handle Blades with Caution: Exercise caution when handling the interchangeable blades, as they are sharp and can cause injury if mishandled. Always handle the blades with care and avoid direct contact with the blade edges to prevent accidental cuts or injuries.

2.Use Proper Cutting Techniques: Follow proper cutting techniques and guidelines provided in the user manual to ensure safe and efficient slicing, chopping, and dicing. Avoid applying excessive force or using improper cutting motions that may lead to accidents or damage to the slicer.

3.Keep Away from Children: Store the vegetable slicer in a safe and secure location, out of reach of children. The sharp blades and components pose a potential hazard to children, so it's essential to store the slicer in a place where children cannot access it to prevent accidents or injuries.
